summary: Lewis Hamilton seeks to build momentum at Spa as Ferrari chase redemption after Spain exposed their fragility against McLaren's resurgent pace. Alpine and Williams battle for crucial midfield points while rain threatens to shuffle the grid and upend strategic calculations on the high-speed Belgian circuit. A victory for Hamilton would mark a third consecutive podium and signal Ferrari's turnaround in the title fight, while a McLaren triumph deepens their challenge to the front-runners' dominance.
